mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, cron_expression, strategy_id, priority, status, number, last_time, total, org_id, company_id, adjust_basis, scope_type, description, bean_class, job_group, days, nums, standard, end_time, execution_time, out_temp_pj, is_use_report_rate, report_rate, is_use_first_control FROM ht_tasks WHERE org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_tasks SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ht_tasks SET last_time = NOW(), number = number + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(out_temp), 2) FROM ht_scope WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId}

SELECT s.id AS scope_id, s.meter_num, s.device_id, s.imei, s.meter_id, s.meter_arc_code, s.dtu_num, s.chan_num, s.org_id, s.company_id, ss.valve_angle, ss.instruction_id, ss.sort AS instruction_sort FROM ht_scope s INNER JOIN ht_strategy_sub ss ON ss.strategy_id = ( SELECT strategy_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(#{taskId} AS UNSIGNED) ) WHERE s.tasks_id = #{taskId} AND s.status NOT IN (9) ORDER BY s.id, ss.sort

SELECT s.id AS scope_id, s.meter_num, s.device_id, s.imei, s.meter_id, s.meter_arc_code, s.dtu_num, s.chan_num, s.org_id, s.company_id, ss.valve_angle, ss.instruction_id, ss.sort AS instruction_sort FROM ht_scope s INNER JOIN ht_strategy_sub ss ON ss.strategy_id = ( SELECT strategy_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(#{taskId} AS UNSIGNED) ) WHERE s.tasks_id = #{taskId} AND s.status NOT IN (9) GROUP BY s.unit_id ORDER BY s.id, ss.sort
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, group_id, strategy_id, command_index, orderr, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, fore_start, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num, out_temp_pj, ref_heat, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{r.id}, #{r.instructionId}, #{r.groupId}, #{r.strategyId}, #{r.commandIndex}, #{r.orderr}, #{r.instructionType}, #{r.instruction}, #{r.number}, #{r.intervall}, #{r.foreStart}, #{r.unit}, #{r.duration}, #{r.orgId}, #{r.companyId}, #{r.concentratorCode}, #{r.deviceId}, #{r.meterNum}, #{r.meterId}, #{r.meterArcCode}, #{r.status}, #{r.instructionStatus}, #{r.sendTime}, #{r.tasksId}, #{r.inTemp}, #{r.outTemp}, #{r.roomTemp}, #{r.valveOpen}, #{r.imei}, #{r.dtuNum}, #{r.chanNum}, #{r.outTempPj}, #{r.refHeat}, #{r.createBy}, #{r.createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_scope SET status = 9 WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId} AND status NOT IN (9)
UPDATE ht_scope SET status = 9 WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId} AND status NOT IN (9)
UPDATE ht_scope SET status = #{status} WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId}
